hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: 🔌 Simple command-line tool for sharing a terminal over the web.

options.name: address
options.description: IP address to use [localhost]. Use any to listen to any available address. Ex (0.0.0.0, any, 192.168.2.3, ...). [default: 127.0.0.1]

options.name: unix-socket
options.description: Use the given Unix domain socket path for the server to listen to [default: ]

options.name: port
options.description: Port to use [5000]. Use 0 for a dynamic port. [default: 5000]

options.name: theme
options.description: Theme to use, uses a simple black theme by default [default: default]
